calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-30-2006 Failure To Post Jury Fees

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Mar-30-2006 Vacated

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-30-2006 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jameel Shihadeh for/with Plaintiff; LSA Cathy Mosbrucker for/with Defendant

Settlement conference held. Stipulation for entry of judgment placed on the record as follows: Plaintiff to have restitution and possession of premises at 1774 - 10th Avenue, San Francisco. There will be no stay of execution, but no execution upon judgment will take place prior to April 30, 2006. Plaintiff to waive February and March rent in the amount of $2832.70. Defendant gives authority to Plaintiff to use his security deposit of $1405 for payment of rent. Defendant to reimburse Plaintiff $118 for scavenger bill. Each party to bear their own costs and attorney fees. Defendant represents that his roomate agress to the terms of this agreement. Counsel for Plaintiff to put this agreement in writing and mail to defendant for review and signature by him and his roommate. Parties understand and agree to the terms and conditions of stipulated settlement as stated on the record. Trial date is vacated.

Judge Pro Tem Stan Bair, Clerk Kay Peek, Carol Karen CSR #8189 (218)
